message:
feat(fwc): use tri-state MetadataField<bool> for supports_simulate and has_events

Replace ambiguous bool fields with MetadataField<bool> (Known/Unknown/
Unavailable) to distinguish "host says no" from "we don't know because
we're reading from an offline manifest." Offline manifests now set
supports_simulate to Unknown instead of false. Hosts returning live
false become Unknown since the host may lack authoritative negative
evidence. Add host_live_boolean_field() helper and update schema glossary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

+fn host_live_boolean_field(value: bool) -> MetadataField<bool> {
+    if value {
+        MetadataField::Known(true)
+    } else {
+        MetadataField::Unknown
+    }
+}
